title: iris pseudacorus var. bastardii
intro: Iris pseudacorus var. bastardii, also known as Yellow Flag, is a variety of the yellow iris plant, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and tall stem. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Iris pseudacorus var. bastardii include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and ease symptoms associated with digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Iris pseudacorus var. bastardii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
